title: Lava Bucket Trash
description: A Fabric port of Lava Bucket Trashing from Quark's Item Interactions Feature
body:
A port of [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark)'s Item Interactions Module, which allows you to trash items quickly in your inventory using a lava bucket. I plan to bring the other two interactions here eventually.

Hold a burnable item (e.g. not Netherite) that's also not a Shulker Box over a lava bucket in any container. Right-Click to dispose.
